## Checks

- [ ] Added or updated tests for new business logic, or documented why tests are not needed.
- [ ] Kept module dependencies in the `desktop-app -> desktop-ui -> desktop-core` direction.
- [ ] Kept parsing, indexing, filesystem scanning, and process launching out of Compose screens when practical.
- [ ] Avoided introducing platform-specific dependencies without documenting the supported platform.
- [ ] Updated both `values-zh` and `values-en` when adding or changing localized text.
- [ ] Ran the relevant Gradle checks.
